U.S. permit directory

Permit pages organized by state and jurisdiction.

This directory is generated directly from the live PermitPulse jurisdiction catalog. Use it to browse covered permit portals, API-backed jurisdictions, and Mission Control routing without guessing where coverage exists.

Open Mission Control Open California permit search
24 State pages
57 Covered jurisdictions
8 API-backed jurisdictions
State pages

Browse coverage by state

Every state page lists the covered jurisdictions currently available in the shared PermitPulse catalog, with links into each city or county permit page.

Portal-only

2 covered jurisdictions. 0 API-backed and 2 portal-only based on the live PermitPulse catalog.
